programme.title: My 600-Lb. Life
programme.desc: Lacey ballooned up over 600 lbs on pizza and ice cream and knows Dr. Now is her best hope for success; she must now rally her divorced parents around her for support and find a way to modulate her moods that won't include binge-eating.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: My 600-Lb. Life
programme.desc: Brandon is a talented musician with a beautiful voice and a run-away weight problem; he wants to lose weight and embark on a career; he also wants to take the next step with his girlfriend, Taylor, whom he risks losing if he can't make a change.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: My 600-Lb. Life
programme.desc: Maja moves to Houston to undertake a difficult weight-loss journey with the support of her boyfriend, Christian; when Christian decides he's had enough and leaves Maja high and dry, she discovers that the only person she can count on is herself.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: My 600-Lb. Life
programme.desc: Despite moving to Houston with the solid support of her boyfriend, Aaron, and her cousin, Jasmine, Tiffany finds it difficult to break the cycle of depressed eating when her two roommates don't join her diet and leave the house every day for work.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper
programme.desc: Stephen's large, bulbous nose gets him unwanted attention, and he hopes Dr. Lee can help; Veronica wants to be free of secrets, including the bump on her butt; Marty has a large, 30-year-old growth on his shoulder that he is ready to remove.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper
programme.desc: Brittany has been called a monster due to her genetic condition that causes head-to-toe bumps; Leonardo has a fist-size growth on his head, but he is terrified of doctors; Tamyra has skin so thick that she shaves the bottom of her feet for relief.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper
programme.desc: Jaclyn has a lump on the back of her head that causes her emotional distress; Shane has a growth between his eyes that could put him in danger at his electrician job; Brittany has seen multiple doctors about the sores on her body with no answers.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper
programme.desc: Stacey's shoulder growth prevents her from being the playful teacher she once was; Matthew worries that his mysterious shin rash may be dangerous.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper
programme.desc: Lattyse was born with a mysterious growth above her eyebrow that gives her headaches. Robert has a tomato-sized growth on his butt cheek that causes him pain and discomfort. Sharon has an embarrassing, stinky, squirting cyst under her breast.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper
programme.desc: Keke is covered in bumps that make her embarrassed to be intimate with her husband; Jim is a widower with two lumps who wants them removed for himself and his late wife; Corey has been labeled a devil worshipper because of his forehead growth.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper
programme.desc: Monica returns for a second time in hopes that Dr. Lee can remove some more of her face growths; Ken has several large cysts on his head that he has tried to remove on his own; Maranda has a mystery skin sore that causes discomfort.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper
programme.desc: Corey is a drag queen and has a bump dangling from his booty; Adam has a semi-circle of about a dozen cysts on his head that he covers with a hat; Virginia has large growths on both of her upper arms that make it difficult to travel in her RV.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper
programme.desc: Terry's nose growth has prevented him from meeting his grandkids; Remi has alligator-like skin and is not used to taking care of herself; Austin has an embarrassing birthmark right next to his eyelid; Mary Jo has a throbbing bump on her neck.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper
programme.sub-title: My Giant Nose Is Killing Me
programme.desc: Roger has enormous growths on his nose that drip pus, attract flies, and are so large that he can barely breathe; Sandra and Jessie are sisters who bonded over their many undiagnosed face bumps.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper
programme.desc: Roger returns with his gigantic nose growths in the hope that Dr. Lee and her colleagues can help before it's too late; Christine has lost her essence due to a large growth on her shoulder; Tiffany has a recurring cyst on her eyelid.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper
programme.sub-title: Lookin' for Love in Lumpy Places
programme.desc: Gabriel has a huge growth on his clavicle but is terrified of surgery; Karen has dealt with painful, scaly feet for 22 years with no diagnosis; Lorne has embarrassing tumors on his face and body and believes this is why he hasn't met the one yet.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper
programme.desc: Ruben is a personal trainer whose head growth has prevented him from seeing clients; Kaitlin has blue marks and scars up and down her arms due to long-term drug use; Adrian was left with a disfiguring bump on her behind after falling down stairs.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper
programme.desc: Margarita is a matriarch who has been hiding her armpit lump from her family; Kayla is an aspiring musician with a promising career that her painful eczema has brought to a halt; Bradley has a concerning growth that looks like raw meat on his leg.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper
programme.desc: Jeremy is a pastor with a hanging growth in an embarrassing location; Evelyn has recurring keloids that have been removed three times and come back bigger each time; Todd has a bump protruding from his forehead.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper
programme.desc: Tameru is a drag queen, but he has a myriad of cysts that are the real drag; Devon has uneven skin she thinks may be the result of a hysterectomy a decade ago; Amy has large growths all over her head that make her look like a "hot mess.".

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper
programme.desc: Jason lost their confidence and motivation due to the large growth on his neck; Shawnell's multiple mystery bumps on her head destroy her self-esteem; Jim's growth protruding off of his nose makes it hard to breathe.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper
programme.desc: Roger has a growth on his shoulder that he calls his second head; Jenna is a teenager with a bubble behind her ear; Susan is covered in bumps that effect her everyday life.

programme.title: 911: The Bronx
programme.desc: A man falls five stories; a shopkeeper is shot in the head at point-blank range; a woman accidentally drinks a bottle of cleaning fluid.

programme.title: 911: The Bronx
programme.desc: A man wounded in a drive-by shooting; a patient with flesh-eating bacteria; a woman hit by a car.

programme.title: 911: The Bronx
programme.desc: Two brothers arrive at the ER after being crushed by a falling building; a victim of a gang-related incident; a patient who fell 40 feet.

programme.title: Cellblock 6: Female Lock Up
programme.sub-title: This is Where I Lay Head
programme.desc: A woman cracks under the pressure of jail life; a woman who is pregnant finds herself in the middle of a jailhouse brawl; a heroin addict chooses to stay in jail.

programme.title: Cellblock 6: Female Lock Up
programme.desc: A woman works through the fallout of her addiction; a woman involved in a drug cartel seeks redemption; a pregnant woman prays; a woman attempts to smuggle contraband.

programme.title: Cellblock 6: Female Lock Up
programme.desc: A jail newcomer gets more than she bargains for; a young mother's release is postponed; the tenth trip for a heroin addict.

programme.title: Cellblock 6: Female Lock Up
programme.desc: A crack-addicted pregnant prostitute finds safe haven in jail; two best friends share a heroin addiction; a prostitute struggles to overcome her past.

programme.title: Secretly Pregnant
programme.desc: Krystal is keeping the baby a secret; Danie fears her dad will reject her baby.

programme.title: Secretly Pregnant
programme.desc: Carmen is a struggling single mother; Jerline and her husband are unemployed.
